labels: enhancement

## Problem statement

<!-- What limitation or gap does this feature address?
     e.g. "There is no way to export trained checkpoints in ONNX format,
     which blocks deployment to edge hardware." -->

<!-- Describe the feature you'd like, including any API or config changes.

     `torch.onnx.export` and writes to `checkpoints/<name>.onnx`." -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What other approaches did you consider and why did you rule them out? -->
